title: SaaS tenant isolation — scoped users, login DB schema, tenant auth store
description:
Each SaaS virtualbox now gets its own Postgres schema (tenant_*) with a login_users mirror table and Wasabi auth/latest.json, created when the tenant draft is first saved.

GET /users, create/update/delete user, permissions tree, and companies list are scoped to the signed-in tenant. Tenant subdomain login rejects accounts from other workspaces. Portal self-signup on a tenant subdomain binds new users to that tenant only — no more global user directory leak in Settings.

Who is affected: all pipeshare.net SaaS tenants and workspace owners. Existing tenants receive postgres_schema on next setup save or provision.
changeLog: Create per-tenant Postgres schema + login_users table on tenant draft.
Scope GET /users to tenant portal_client_id and company membership.
Tenant owners can manage users only inside their workspace.
Block cross-tenant login on company subdomains.
Bind portal sign-ups on tenant hosts to that tenant; sync auth snapshot.
